texto: I'm a man. Men cook outside. That outdoor grilling is a manly pursuit has long been beyond question. If this wasn't understood, you'd never get grown men to put on those aprons with pictures of dancing weenies on the front, and messages like 'Come 'n' Get It!
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a William Geist: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de limites e escolhas conscientes. O trecho “I'm a man. Men cook outside. That outdoor grilling is a manly pursuit has long been beyond questi…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que desenvolvimento-pessoal, food, men pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de men.
